APP_URL.description: Public URL of your Arcane instance. Required. Auto-populated from Railway's public domain; override if using a custom domain.

ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Random secret for encryption. Auto-generated. Override with: openssl rand -hex 32 (64-char hex) or any sufficiently long random string.

JWT_SECRET.description: Random secret for JWT signing. Auto-generated. Override with: openssl rand -hex 32 (64-char hex) or any sufficiently long random string.
